title: yosys fails in synthesizing D flip-flop

features.name: async reset dff with level-sensitive reset condition in assignment
features.description: Code should include an async reset D flip-flop where the reset signal appears both in the sensitivity list (negedge rst_n) and as a level-sensitive condition (!rst_n) inside a ternary assignment expression, causing 'Multiple edge sensitive events' error
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)
begin
	q <= !rst_n ? '0 : d;
end

features.name: ternary reset assignment in procedural block
features.description: Code should include a procedural block with an async clock where a ternary operator is used to assign a value based on the inverse of the reset signal (!rst_n ? '0 : d)
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)
q <= !rst_n ? '0 : d;
